_comment: COUNTY OVERRIDE LAYER — Kimley-Horn Nuclear Task Force. Hand-maintained, keyed by 5-digit FIPS. Add county/municipal ordinances and local codes here as they are documented. flag: restricted | favorable | watch. No clean nationwide county-rules dataset exists, so this layer is curated as items are confirmed.

36059.name: Nassau County
36059.note: Within former LILCO service area — Long Island nuclear construction moratorium applies.

36103.name: Suffolk County
36103.note: Within former LILCO service area — Long Island nuclear construction moratorium applies.

36081.name: Queens County
36081.note: Portions within former LILCO service area subject to the Long Island moratorium.
